changes.value:
## What
Replace `backendDispatch` (2 calls) in `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/entity-commands.ts`. Two functions to update:
- `useEntityCommands` (hook) — use `useDispatchCommand` directly
- `buildEntityCommandDefs` (non-hook factory) — accept a dispatch function as parameter instead of calling `backendDispatch` directly. Callers of `buildEntityCommandDefs` must pass the dispatch function from the hook.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No imports of `backendDispatch` or `dispatchCommand`
- [ ] `useEntityCommands` uses `useDispatchCommand` internally
- [ ] `buildEntityCommandDefs` accepts dispatch function parameter

## Tests
- [ ] `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm test` — all unit tests pass
